body.title: Fix: openrouter_reasoner.py:520 self._model() should be self.model
body.description:
openrouter_reasoner.py:520 calls self._model() (method call) in the CONTEXT_OVERFLOW logging path, but the attribute is self.model (plain attribute). Raises AttributeError caught as BARE_EXCEPT. Not the primary drop cause but fires on every context-overflow turn as noise.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/reasoners/openrouter_reasoner.py (line ~520)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code
**Scope boundary:** IN — one-line typo fix. OUT — refactoring model attribute naming.
**Test plan:** grep confirms self._model() no longer exists; BARE_EXCEPT for this error stops appearing in errors.log.
